ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this run belongs to */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the run was conducted */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date of the run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the run */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run this trial belongs to */,
  "left_answer" INTEGER /* Answer provided for the left option */,
  "right_answer" INTEGER /* Answer provided for the right option */,
  "choice_duration" REAL /* Duration of choice in seconds */,
  "isi_duration" REAL /* Duration of inter-stimulus interval in seconds */,
  "feedback_duration" REAL /* Duration of feedback shown to participants */,
  "iti_duration" REAL /* Duration of inter-trial interval in seconds */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the trial */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this color data belongs to */,
  "left_color" TEXT /* Color used for the left stimulus */,
  "right_color" TEXT /* Color used for the right stimulus */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the color entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the color entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this statistic belongs to */,
  "mu1" REAL /* Mean value for the first response */,
  "mu2" REAL /* Mean value for the second response */,
  "sd1" REAL /* Standard deviation for the first response */,
  "sd2" REAL /* Standard deviation for the second response */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the statistical entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the statistical entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistical entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistical entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the participant entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the participant entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this feedback belongs to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback given */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feedback entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the feedback entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run this condition belongs to */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the condition entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the condition entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_statistics" (
  "run_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run statistic entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run this statistic belongs to */,
  "average_choice_duration" REAL /* Average choice duration across trials in seconds */,
  "total_trials" INTEGER /* Total number of trials conducted in this run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the run statistic entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the run statistic entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run statistic entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run statistic entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_statistics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_runs" (
  "participant_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant-run association */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the participant-run association */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the participant-run association */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant-run association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant-run association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_runs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_runs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_participants" (
  "trial_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial-participant association */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the trial-participant association */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the trial-participant association */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial-participant association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial-participant association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_participants_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
